settings.heading: FAQ's
settings.subtext: From jewellery to stores, shop all of our pieces in the one place.

settings.question: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.answer: We accept all major debit cards, credit cards, UPI, wallets, and net banking.

settings.question: Is it safe to make payments on your website?
settings.answer: Absolutely. We use secure and encrypted payment gateways to ensure your payment and personal information is protected.

settings.question: Can I pay using international cards or currency?
settings.answer: Currently, we only accept payments made using Indian cards and Indian currency (INR)

settings.question: What should I do if my payment fails?
settings.answer: If your payment fails, please try again using a different method. If the issue persists, contact your bank or reach out to our support team at support@ineezy.in.

settings.question: Will I receive a payment confirmation?
settings.answer: Yes, once your payment is successful, you will receive an order confirmation email with your payment and order details.

settings.question: How can I place an order?
settings.answer: Simply browse our website, add your desired items to the cart, and proceed to checkout. Fill in your shipping details and make the payment to place your order.

settings.question: How do I know if my order is confirmed?
settings.answer: After a successful purchase, you will receive an order confirmation email with all the order details.

settings.question: Can I modify my order after placing it?
settings.answer: Unfortunately, modifications are not possible once the order is placed. You may request a cancellation (if the order hasn't been shipped) and place a new order.

settings.question: I didn’t receive a confirmation email. What should I do?
settings.answer: Please check your spam or promotions folder. If it’s still not found, contact our support team at support@ineezy.in with your name and payment details.

settings.question: What if I receive the wrong item?
settings.answer: In the rare case you receive an incorrect product, please email us within 48 hours with an unedited unboxing video and product photos. We will assist you with a resolution.

settings.question: How do I track my order?
settings.answer: Once your order is shipped, you’ll receive an email with tracking details. You can click on the link to track your package in real time.

settings.question: What payment methods are accepted?
settings.answer: We accept all major debit/credit cards, UPI, wallets, net banking.
